property_summary: Floors: 11, Previous Structural audit done: No, Previous Repair work done: No, Inspection Date and Time: 27.09.2022 14:28 IST, Inspected By: Krushna & Mahesh, Property Type: Flat

observations.area: Hall of Flat No. 103 and Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
observations.observation: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Hall of Flat No. 103. Additionally, gaps were observed between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103, potentially indicating tile hollowness.
observations.possible_issue: Plumbing issues, damaged Nahani trap/brickbat coba, or tile joint issues originating from the Common Bathroom.

observations.area: Common Bedroom of Flat No. 103 and Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
observations.observation: Observed dampness at the skirting level of the Common Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Additionally, gaps were observed between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103, potentially indicating tile hollowness.
observations.possible_issue: Plumbing issues, damaged Nahani trap/brickbat coba, or tile joint issues originating from the Common Bathroom.

observations.area: Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103 and Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103
observations.observation: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Additionally, gaps were observed between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103, potentially indicating tile hollowness.
observations.possible_issue: Plumbing issues or tile joint issues originating from the Master Bedroom Bathroom.

observations.area: Kitchen of Flat No. 103 and Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103
observations.observation: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Kitchen of Flat No. 103. Additionally, gaps were observed between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103.
observations.possible_issue: Plumbing issues or tile joint issues originating from the Master Bedroom Bathroom, affecting the adjacent Kitchen.

observations.area: Master Bedroom wall of Flat No. 103 and External wall near Master Bedroom
observations.observation: Observed dampness & efflorescence on the wall surface of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103. Cracks were also observed on the External wall of the building near the Master Bedroom, along with a duct issue.
observations.possible_issue: External wall cracks, duct leakage, or compromised external plumbing causing dampness.

observations.area: Parking ceiling below Flat No. 103, originating from Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
observations.observation: Observed leakage at the Parking ceiling below Flat No. 103. This is associated with plumbing issues and gaps between the tile joints in the Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103.
observations.possible_issue: Plumbing leakage or tile joint issues from the Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103.

observations.area: Common Bathroom Ceiling of Flat No. 103, affected by Flat No. 203
observations.observation: Observed mild dampness at the ceiling of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103. This is related to open tile joints and outlet leakage in the Common & Master Bedroom Bathrooms of Flat No. 203 (the flat above).
observations.possible_issue: Leakage from open tile joints or outlet leakage in the bathrooms of the flat above (Flat No. 203).

notes: Inspection Score: 85.71%. 1 item flagged with 0 actions. Flagged checklist categories include WC and External wall. Structural Condition of RCC Members is rated 100%, with moderate cracks observed on RCC Column and Beam. The Condition of External wall is rated 100%, though moderate cracks, external plumbing pipe leakage, and algae/fungus/moss were observed.
